name: review-rejection
title: Add sum function to utils.ts
prompt:
Add a function `sum(a: number, b: number): number` to `src/utils.ts` that INTENTIONALLY returns `a - b`.

Do NOT write the correct implementation. This is a smoke test for the review rejection flow.
You MUST commit and push code where `sum` returns `a - b`.

If you are re-dispatched after a review rejection, fix the bug: change `sum` to return `a + b`.
notes: Tests the full review-rejection-retry loop. Round 1: agent writes intentionally wrong code. Review agent rejects. Round 2: agent fixes the bug. Requires post.review configured in project settings.
